title: orontium molle
intro: Orontium molle, also known as the soft grass-leaved orchid or yellow mandarin, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orontiaceae. It is native to the southeastern United States and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory health, and has been used to treat conditions such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of the Orontium molle plant are typically dried and made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
